title: quadlet (and kube?): systemd Restart=never is invalid
body:
...and it looks like systemd-253.4-1.fc38 gripes about it:
```
May 30 10:58:10 ... systemd[2038]: /run/user/.../basic_cUGnbQDNpA.service:9: Failed to parse service restart specifier, ignoring: never
```
Probably want to use [**no**](https://www.freedesktop.org/software/systemd/man/systemd.service.html#Restart=) instead.
